creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #3)
BTW, I'm unable to reproduce. I just created a new instance and see:

$ gcloud version                     
Google Cloud SDK 94.0.0                        
                                    
bq 2.0.18                                        
bq-nix 2.0.18                       
core 2016.01.22                      
core-nix 2016.01.22                  
gcloud                                                                     
gsutil 4.16                                
gsutil-nix 4.16                                                      

Also, I upgraded the packages and see:

$ gcloud version
Google Cloud SDK 195.0.0
bq 2.0.30
core 2018.03.23
gsutil 4.29

Can you still reproduce?
